allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); holidays=[d for d in data if d['isHoliday'] and d['date'].startswith\('202604'\)]; print\(json.dumps\(holidays, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\Jerlsy\\.claude\\projects\\Z--Developer-ShopManager\\30d40516-7772-461d-be02-dd15f4d8066d.jsonl' -Tail 10; foreach \($line in $lines\) { try { $obj = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; $msg = $obj.message; if \($msg -and $msg.content\) { foreach \($c in $msg.content\) { if \($c.type -eq 'text' -and $c.text\) { $text = $c.text; $role = $msg.role; Write-Output "=== [$role] ==="; Write-Output $text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(600, $text.Length\)\); Write-Output "" } } } } catch { Write-Output "parse error" } })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\Jerlsy\\.claude\\projects\\Z--Developer-ShopManager\\30d40516-7772-461d-be02-dd15f4d8066d.jsonl'; $count = $lines.Count; Write-Output "Total lines: $count"; foreach \($line in \($lines | Select-Object -Last 15\)\) { try { $obj = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; $role = $obj.message.role; $content = $obj.message.content; if \($content\) { foreach \($c in $content\) { if \($c.type -eq 'text'\) { Write-Output "=== $role ==="; Write-Output \($c.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $c.text.Length\)\)\); Write-Output "---" } } } } catch {} })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\Jerlsy\\.claude\\projects\\Z--Developer-ShopManager\\30d40516-7772-461d-be02-dd15f4d8066d.jsonl'; $selected = $lines | Select-Object -Last 30; foreach \($line in $selected\) { try { $obj = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; $role = $obj.message.role; if \($role\) { $content = $obj.message.content; if \($content -is [array]\) { foreach \($c in $content\) { if \($c -and $c.type -eq 'text' -and $c.text\) { Write-Output "=== $role ==="; Write-Output \($c.text.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(400,$c.text.Length\)\)\); Write-Output "---" } } } } } catch { Write-Output "err: $_" } })
